data.body:
Why? 

POTUS got 49%-50% election support in 2020 and 55%-43% in 2024. 

But there are now 40% of Catholics who strongly oppose the administration. 

Support is now under 50% and strong support is less than half of that.

On Iran 60% oppose his approach. Use of force is opposed by 55%.
